free_text: STRUCTURE OF 12-B FROM MEASUREMENT AND R-MATRIX
41.2 GRAMS OF POWDERED B ENRICHED TO 97.2 PERCENT
11-B IN AN ALUMINUM CAN 4.0 CM HIGH AND 3.3 CM IN
NE-213 LIQUID SCINTILLATOR, 5 CM THICK AND
11.25 CM DIAMETER FOR SCATTERED NEUTRONS. NE-102
PLASTIC SCINTILLATOR WAS USED AS A FLUX MONITOR.
RELATIVE TO THE ZERO-DEGREE YIELD OF T(P,N) REACTION.
DATA CORRECTED FOR BEAM ATTENUATION, AIR SCATTERING,
MULTIPLE SCATTERING IN THE SAMPLE AND BACKGROUND.
TOTAL ERRORS GIVEN INCLUDE UNCERTAINTY IN
-MEASURED DISTANCES AND NUMBER OF NUCLEI IN SAMPLE
